## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] `./.venv/bin/python -m faceid.selftest` passes
- [ ] The menu bar app still compiles (`bash scripts/build-app.sh`)
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) if this is user-facing
- [ ] I did **not** add claims that this is a real security feature
